headings.style: Modern, crisp, VR-age tech feel. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for specific mystical accents.

body.style: Clean, highly legible geometric sans for UI density.

visual_enhancers.background: CSS Fluid Mesh Gradient. Use 3-4 soft radial gradients moving infinitely via CSS @keyframes. This achieves the 'flowing graphics' without the heavy JS payload.
visual_enhancers.surfaces: Glassmorphism. bg-black/40 or bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-2xl, border border-white/10, shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]. Must feel like floating crystal.
visual_enhancers.particles: Use tsparticles for a subtle floating 'star dust' effect behind the glass, enhancing the depth.
visual_enhancers.hover: Subtle inner glow on hover (box-shadow inset 0 0 15px rgba(255,255,255,0.1)).

grids.type: Floating Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A & B hybrid)
grids.desktop: grid-cols-4 or grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8) for a floating effect.

layouts.style: Floating and asymmetrical. The layout should look like floating panes of crystal in space.
layouts.spacing: Generous padding inside glass cards (p-6, p-8) to avoid content collision with borders.

motion.drag_and_drop: Draggable widgets via @dnd-kit/core or framer-motion drag. Users can reposition their sanctuary tools.
motion.page_transitions: FORBIDDEN. Do not use Framer Motion for page routing to maintain high performance.
motion.micro_animations: Use Framer Motion for widget mounting (spring, scale 0.95 -> 1), drag feedback, and hover states.

accessibility.contrast: Maintain 4.5:1 ratio over the fluid mesh by utilizing bg-black/40 in glass cards.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.

media.images: High-contrast mystical, cosmos, and refraction assets.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Use Three.js / React Three Fiber specifically and ONLY for the '3D Star Chart' feature. Keep the rest of the app 2.5D with Parallax.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the fluid mesh gradient as a purely CSS-based background with `@keyframes` mapped across radial gradients. This provides the 'flowing' requirement without impacting 30fps performance.
Use framer-motion ONLY for component-level micro-animations (hover, drag feedback, entrance), explicitly do NOT use AnimatePresence for page routing.
Build a 'GlassCard' component (`bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-2xl border border-white/10`) to serve as the base for all widgets. Do NOT use solid backgrounds for dashboard widgets.
Incorporate `lucide-react` icons extensively for the mystical UI elements. DO NOT use emojis.
Make the 'Cosmic Mixer' a globally available, floating action widget that expands out into actions.
Integrate the 5 requested color themes by controlling the CSS variables used in the mesh gradient background.
universal_guidelines: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Use layered design elements with z-index hierarchy (Mesh Background -> Particles -> Glass Widgets -> Content) for a VR-age depth effect.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds for overlays that have content underneath.
Never use pure #000000; use #030308 (Deep Cosmic Indigo) or similar deep shades.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetrical or balanced floating bento structures.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects. Static = dead.
